2313380.name: Vicious Red
2313380.description:
Vicious Red unfolds on a sprawling space station in a near alternative past. After losing the moon race, the Soviet Union makes a fateful decision to focus on developing space shuttle technology. Thanks to engineering breakthroughs, they manage to build ships capable of delivering humans to another planet.

However, a disaster of unknown origin has struck an alien space station, transforming nearly all of its inhabitants into hostile mutants. You step into the role of an engineer, arriving during a new wave of colonization. To survive, you must uncover the truth behind the outbreak and deal with its terrifying aftermath.

The game will feature Soviet brutalism, constructivism, and Soviet space futurism as its primary styles and aesthetics. Puzzles are based on pseudo-scientific realistic engineering, mechanical, chemical, or electrical tasks, designed to feel like real challenges on a space station.

Vicious Red is a third-person survival horror game that stays true to the genre's best traditions. Enemies will haunt your every step, and survival here depends on you... Looking for a realistic horror experience? Welcome to Vicious Red!
2313380.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 法语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
